title: L'étrange Madame X
writer: Marcelle Maurette, Pierre Laroche, Albert Valentin
actors: Michèle Morgan, Henri Vidal, Arlette Thomas
plot: Can a person really lead a double life? It looks as though Irène can. On the one hand, she is the wife of Jacques Voisin-Larive, a big name in the publishing world. On the other hand she pretends to be a simple chambermaid when sh...
